education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.key_takeaways: Focusing on scalable systems and LLM integration.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Engineering

cloud_infra: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS, Bedrock, Fargate, KMS, RDS)

experience_modules.summary_sentence: Engineered a scalable microservices architecture for an LLM-powered platform processing high-volume document ingestion.
bullet_points_pool: Architected a microservices ecosystem (Core, Data Ingestion, RAG) using Python, Flask, and NextJS.
Implemented a secure S3 multipart upload pipeline with ClamAV scanning for malware detection.
Designed an asynchronous task queue using RabbitMQ and Celery to handle heavy file processing workloads.
Developed a retry-able ingestion pipeline that checkpoints failed stages (e.g., extraction, chunking) to prevent data loss.

experience_modules.summary_sentence: Designed advanced RAG pipelines to improve retrieval accuracy for complex queries.
bullet_points_pool: Engineered a Hybrid Search system combining Semantic Search (pgvector) and Keyword Search (tsvector).
Implemented K-Means Clustering (k=11) to auto-generate topics and sub-topics from document chunks.
Optimized retrieval using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) and Cohere’s Reranker to prioritize most relevant context.
Developed 'Query Transformation' logic to generate similar queries and broaden search coverage.

metrics.accuracy: Superior retrieval accuracy via RRF and Hybrid Search

experience_modules.summary_sentence: Deployed OpenAI's Whisper model to streamline medical transcription.
bullet_points_pool: Deployed OpenAI's Whisper model on GCP to transcribe doctor-patient conversations securely.
Implemented critical memory-leak handling and model-crash recovery protocols to ensure production stability.
Built a semantic search system allowing users to search across video content using natural language.
Integrated Stripe for paywall management and implemented live streaming capabilities.

metrics.efficiency: Reduced manual content review time by 60%

experience_modules.summary_sentence: Developed full-stack internal tools for HR and document management.
bullet_points_pool: Enhanced a Document Management System with granular role-based permissions and UUID-based encryption.
Built 'Skillopedia', a talent pool tracker using Java Spring Boot and React for HR resource allocation.

experience_modules.summary_sentence: Led a team of 5 to build an LLM-powered talent assignment tool.
bullet_points_pool: Led a team of 5 engineers, serving as the primary LLM subject matter expert.
Solved the challenge of matching engineers to projects by creating a semantic search interface over employee skills.

experience_modules.summary_sentence: A modular RESTful API for high-integrity transaction processing.
bullet_points_pool: Implemented Atomic Transactions in MySQL to ensure data integrity during concurrent booking operations.
Optimized SQL queries using complex joins to generate real-time analytical reports on revenue trends.
